Property of entity to sort by

description.content:
Create or update the Mobile app. When creating mobile app, platform generates Mobile App Id as [time-based UUID](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universally_unique_identifier#Version_1_(date-time_and_MAC_address)). The newly created Mobile App Id will be present in the response. Specify existing Mobile App Id to update the mobile app. Referencing non-existing Mobile App Id will cause 'Not Found' error.

The pair of mobile app package name and platform type is unique for entire platform setup.



Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

item.name: Save or Update Mobile App Bundle (saveMobileAppBundle)

request.name: Save or Update Mobile App Bundle (saveMobileAppBundle)

description.content:
Create or update the Mobile app bundle that represents tha pair of ANDROID and IOS app and mobile settings like oauth2 clients, self-registration and layout configuration.When creating mobile app bundle, platform generates Mobile App Bundle Id as [time-based UUID](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universally_unique_identifier#Version_1_(date-time_and_MAC_address)). The newly created Mobile App Bundle Id will be present in the response. Referencing non-existing Mobile App Bundle Id will cause 'Not Found' error.

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.

description.content:

Available for users with 'SYS_ADMIN' or 'TENANT_ADMIN' authority.
